description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Emscripten that runs on push and workflow dispatch events. The workflow uses an ubuntu-24.04 environment and checks out the code, installs Emscripten SDK, and then performs a matrix build with different build types (Debug, Release, DevDist, LuaDist). For each build type, it configures CMake, makes the project, and optionally packages and pushes artifacts to a public repository.
